languages.text: The user gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and immediately resets cooldowns on all attacks and attack {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.
languages.original_text: Персонаж получает +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g}, а период восстановления всех его атак и атакующих {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способностей{/g} мгновенно завершается. В начале своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он становится {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломлен{/g}. Эффект действует до конца боя.

At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they gain +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: Персонаж получает +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g}, а период восстановления всех его атак и атакующих {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способностей{/g} мгновенно завершается. В начале своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он становится {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломлен{/g}. Эффект действует до конца боя.

Персонаж получает +1 ОД, а период восстановления всех его атак и атакующих способностей мгновенно завершается. В начале своего следующего хода он получает +1 уровень ошеломления. Эффект действует до конца боя.

languages.text: 使用者获得1点{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}，并立即重置所有攻击及攻击{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}的冷却时间。在下一{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，使用者陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}状态，持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text: The user gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and immediately resets cooldowns on all attacks and attack {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: 使用者获得1点{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}，并立即重置所有攻击及攻击{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}的冷却时间。在下一{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，使用者陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}状态，持续至战斗结束。

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を1獲得し、直ちに攻撃すべてのクールダウンと攻撃{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}をリセットする。次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時に、戦闘終了時まで継続する{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろけ{/g}のスタックを1獲得。
languages.original_text: The user gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and immediately resets cooldowns on all attacks and attack {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they gain +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を1獲得し、直ちに攻撃すべてのクールダウンと攻撃{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}をリセットする。次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時に、戦闘終了時まで継続する{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}よろけ{/g}のスタックを1獲得。

languages.text: El usuario obtiene +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} y reiniciar todos los tiempos de recuperación de sus ataques y {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} ofensivas al instante. Al principio de su siguiente {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text: The user gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and immediately resets cooldowns on all attacks and attack {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: El usuario obtiene +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} y reiniciar todos los tiempos de recuperación de sus ataques y {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} ofensivas al instante. Al principio de su siguiente {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} hasta el final del combate.

El usuario obtiene +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} y reiniciar todos los tiempos de recuperación de sus ataques y {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} ofensivas al instante. Al principio de su siguiente {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario obtiene +1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}desequilibrado{/g} que mantiene hasta el final del combate.

languages.text: Der Nutzer erhält +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} und setzt sofort die Abklingzeiten aller Angriffe und {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Angriffsfähigkeiten{/g} zurück. Zu Beginn seines nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} wird der Nutzer mit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} belegt, das bis zum Ende des Kampfes andauert.
languages.original_text: The user gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and immediately resets cooldowns on all attacks and attack {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer erhält +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} und setzt sofort die Abklingzeiten aller Angriffe und {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Angriffsfähigkeiten{/g} zurück. Zu Beginn seines nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} wird der Nutzer mit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} belegt, das bis zum Ende des Kampfes andauert.

Der Nutzer erhält +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} und die Abklingzeiten aller Angriffe und {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Angriffsfähigkeiten{/g} werden sofort zurückgesetzt. Zu Beginn seines nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} erhält er bis zum Ende des Kampfes +1 {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumelnd{/g} (stapelbar).

languages.text: L'utilisateur gagne +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} et réinitialise immédiatement les temps de recharge de toutes les attaques et {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} d'attaque. Au début du prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} de l'utilisateur, il subit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text: The user gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and immediately resets cooldowns on all attacks and attack {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur gagne +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} et réinitialise immédiatement les temps de recharge de toutes les attaques et {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} d'attaque. Au début du prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} de l'utilisateur, il subit {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

L'utilisateur bénéficie de +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}, et les temps de recharge de toutes ses attaques et {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} d'attaque se réinitialisent instantanément. Au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} suivant, l'utilisateur obtient +1 cumul de l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g} qui dure jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} kazanır ve tüm saldırıları ile saldırı {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyetlerinin{/g} dolum süresi anında sıfırlanır. Kullanıcı, bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başında {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text: The user gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and immediately resets cooldowns on all attacks and attack {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. At the start of the user's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} that lasts until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} kazanır ve tüm saldırıları ile saldırı {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyetlerinin{/g} dolum süresi anında sıfırlanır. Kullanıcı, bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başında {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

Kullanıcı, +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} kazanır ve tüm saldırıları ile saldırı {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyetlerinin{/g} dolum süresi anında sıfırlanır. Kullanıcı, bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başında +1 {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallama{/g} birikimi elde eder. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
